title: Bread Challenge
body:
# [dannytaylor](https://youtube.com/@MCLegoMan)'s bread challenge

This modpack contains both Loafy and Bales, which together turn all blocks and items into BREAD.  

Want a breader experience? Try adding [Breadity](https://modrinth.com/mod/breadity) to your pack to also change entities!

**My playthroughs:**  
[I turned the whole world into bread...](https://www.youtube.com/live/EHsvDivwAp0)  
[I need to use that bread to get bread so i can make bread](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2I0FiN6Lcvk)  

I wish anyone luck that attempts to speedrun this without f3/advanced tooltips/cheating.
